message: Hey everyone. I'm pumped today about our flash sale
You know it's been 53 years since the Beatles released Abbey Road right? My favourite album
53 years already?? Wow that makes me feel old...
Indeed! We're celebrating today by promoting a flash sale on retro items from 1969
Clicked Start button
We're a step closer to allowing folks to pay for items from the 1960s with Bitcoin thanks to Daniel!
Think of it like time travelling!
Wow good work Daniel! Looking forward to seeing it in action in prod
erm - funny you should say that Daniel I'm just testing my checkout service change in prod and I can't complete the payment - something's up
Sorry Daniel it's not looking good on my end either
Uh oh...here we go again
@Sanjay V can you "Size up the Issue" please and keep us informed
WHat are we seeing ?
@Sanjay V it's worth having a look at the changes made earlier today first
Let me check from my end
Get this sorted ASAP!!!
Sure Bez

Payment Unavailable
Sorry for the inconvenience but we're currently unable to process your payment right now.

Please note that you will not be charged until the issue is resolved.
Our engineers are actively working to restoring service.
We recommend trying again later or selecting a different payment method if available.
I can see an error after checkout
I am getting this error
Same here
Bob Are we receiving customer complaints for the same
Sure let me look at my reports
It's bad. We've started getting tickets from the EU region customers saying they can't complete purchases they get to the payment screen but it fails to process
No new orders have been processed in the UK region for the last 10 minutes
UK is our biggest market accounting for 35% of our user base
Daniel Shay Can you help me with the latest change report that was deployed today
We've received over 380+ complaints in that time period all with the same failure symptoms
Social media is picking up on it too mentions on Twitter and Reddit saying 'Checkout is broken'
Ah
Yeah 2 secconds i will send them over
We're not seeing the issue outside the UK.  Other regions seem to be unaffected
How is our customers doing? Let's put out a post letting them know we are investigating
Unable to Place orders P1
*Incident Number INC100064:* Unable to Place orders P1
Just saw the incident ticket come through can someone tell me what's going on? This sale is huge for us
Can we double check on the region
Here's the detailed info on each of the changes made today
Hope this helps:<https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/ULPUBLIC/pages/1049559041/Bez+s+Beatles+day+Change+Request+logs>
Hey Bez We are seeing errors after the checkout.
I am checking on to it.
Will keep you posted
So far reports are only coming from the UK
Issue is specific to the UK region at the moment.
I did see a CHG related to Checkout Service - CHG89360. From Shay
Let me look into this deeper — I’ll try to replicate and check the logs
I will start with checking logs
Let me take a look as well
Can we please check. Also Daniel I did notice another change for same app to UAT. Can we check if something has passed on to Prod
The checkout service logs are healthy and are working as intended
Could it be your checkout change again @Shay? It broke the platform last week!
Any updates on the investigation?
Please don't remind me @Daniel :cold_face:
The checkout service logs are healthy and the service is working as intended
I will check this but most likely not the case as UAT wouldn't affect the PROD

Subject: P1 - *INC100064*- Customers unable to Place orders

Impact Description: Customers from UK region are expericing issues in placing orders on the website.

Latest Update: Teams are currently checking the issue more updates to follow

Next Update: 16:30 UTC

Regards
Major Incident Management Team.
We can start with checkout rollback
Are we confident with the rollback ?
Can we also check CHG89362 Daniel
Bez We have identified couple of changes that went in today. Troubleshooting underway
I will but it's very unlikely to be payments as I don't see any crypto-related errors
Daniel /Shay Can we check from when the issue started ?
We can get the platform team involved to see if they have any stats for us
Daniel The recent change was for Payment Service. Like 10 minutes ago. Coincides with the issue start time. Can we recheck on all services before we confirm anything
I think i need to dig more into logs now”
I see 504 HTTP errors in the payment service which means the application is failing to serve the requests
Daniel haven't you made a change to payments recently right?
Bob Can you recheck on the region from the user reports.
My change couldn't be an issue it was to support crypto payment although the code hasn't been invoked yet so I doubt that's to do with it
Could Shay's change in Checkout be skipping some validation maybe?
Sure
Daniel Can we check on Payments. Shay is refering to an issue with Payments
Shay Can you double check on your CHG again.
As it stands now we are only receiving reports from the UK. The first report was submitted about 15 minutes ago
Sure
Honestly I don't think this is coming from my change. The Bitcoin feature isn't even active yet and the frontend hasn't been updated
Could this be load-related? It's a flash sale after all
Have we figured out the root cause yet?
Hey Hamed WE might need your hand here. We are noticing issues with at the checkout. Shows Payment unavailable. We have identified recent change with Payments. Can you assist us on this
Daniel Please read through the error. It says Payment Unavailable
Online now but i've been following with the conversation. I can take a look now and let you know what i find
Not yet. We are close in identifying the cause.
Sure I will double-check
I have Hamed to advise on further investigation.
I can see from user experience that it's failing at the payments stage and I can also see HTTP 504 in payments
This is a clear indication that the checkout service is working but not the payments
Thanks Hamed. Daniel I guess your change might be the cause. Please rollback once we are good without interupting other services.
I have double checked checkout it's working as intended and the time of the deployment doesn't match with the first report so it can't be checkout
Yes Shay I noticed the same.
Fine if we really think this is the issue I'll roll it back but we're knowingly breaking the fix for the France bug
Just make sure you make changes to the payments DB before you do the rollback as there are some dependencies
Sure!
The France bug has resurfaced as expected but it's low impact and isolated. I'll prep a hotfix for that after this!

Subject: P1 - *INC100064*- UK Customers unable to Place orders

Impact Description: Customers from UK region are experiencing issues in placing orders on the website.

Latest Update: We have identified a probable cause of this issue and currently teams are working on the mitigation.
Further updates will be sahred as we make progress.

Next Update: 16:45UTC

Regards
Major Incident Management Team.
Keep us posted once we have rolledback successfully
Any luck Daniel
I'm 100% confident on my change still not happy with the rollback
Bob Have we sent out comms to the customers for the same.
Hamed Whats your take on the rollback
Rolling back CHG89358 now....
I have they are notified
The payment change has been successfully rolled back
Sorry I missed some common library dependencies that probably caused the issue
I can place orders now.
I think everything is pointing towards the payments
Bob Can we please check now with the customers.
On it
Tanya I found another CHG related to Payment DB - CHG89350. Please check
I can see that reports are going down
Bez We have mitigated the issue.
Yes Daniel is aware of it
Validation under progress. We are checking with the customers
Thanks Bob
I think we are good
Are we good to confirm if we have mitigated the issue ? Or do we need anyother validations.
I can place an order
That will do for me
All services are working and no errors
Perfect
Looks like everything's working from the frontend and checkout side again
I am sending the resolved comms.
Happy to confirm it's resolved on our end

Subject: P1 - *INC100064*- UK Customers unable to Place orders - RESOLVED

Impact Description: Customers from UK region are experiencing issues in placing orders on the website.

Latest Update: Teams have mitigated the issue and the orders are processing now as expected.

Next Update: N/A
Regards
Major Incident Management Team.
